frontmatter.pattern_key: missing_access_control | access_control, authorization_logic, capability_management | missing_authorization, signer_exposure, role_escalation, capability_misuse

patterns.title: Move Access Control and Authorization Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause:
Move uses different access control paradigms per chain:

- **Aptos**: Signer-based + SignerCapability for resource accounts

- **Sui**: Object ownership + capability objects for delegated access

- **

frontmatter.pattern_key: arithmetic_error | calculation_logic, token_conversion, fee_computation | precision_loss, overflow, underflow, division_by_zero, rounding_error

patterns.title: Move Arithmetic and Precision Vulnerabilities
patterns.rootCause:
Move uses unsigned integers (u8, u64, u128, u256) that abort on overflow/underflow rather than wrapping. This differs from Solidity's historical wrapping behavior but creates analogous issues:

- Divi

patterns.title: 1. Public vs Public(package) Visibility Misuse

patterns.rootCause: LP supply not validated after swap

patterns.title: 1. CLMM Sqrt-Price Overflow

patterns.title: 3. BigVector / Container Size Overflow
patterns.rootCause: depth > 0 causes max_slice_size ^ (depth + 1) nodes

patterns.title: 4. Accumulator / Volume Counter Overflow
patterns.rootCause: u64 volume accumulator overflows with high-volume pairs

patterns.title: 5. Type Boundary Overflow (u64 → u128)
patterns.rootCause: amount * PRECISION can exceed u64

patterns.title: 6. RPC / Node-Crash Overflow
patterns.rootCause: (Rust, Sui fullnode): Unchecked subtraction in select_coins

patterns.title: 7. Faulty Constant Definitions
patterns.rootCause: Missing digit — value is 10x too small

patterns.title: 8. Precision Loss in Token Redistribution
patterns.rootCause: Integer division truncates, losing dust

patterns.title: 9. Reward Calculation Rounding Errors
patterns.rootCause: Accumulated rounding dust is silently lost each epoch

patterns.title: 10. Share Price Inflation / First-Depositor Attack
patterns.rootCause: No minimum deposit, shares round to zero

patterns.title: 11. Share-to-Asset Rounding Direction
patterns.rootCause: Rounds DOWN when calculating SUI needed for shares

patterns.title: 12. Incorrect Price Scaling / Conversion
patterns.rootCause: Price feed uses 8 decimals but pool expects 18 decimals

patterns.title: 13. Incorrect Quantity Calculation in Order Books
patterns.rootCause: Uses wrong quantity field in fill calculation

patterns.title: 14. Reward Period Miscalculation
patterns.rootCause: Inclusive vs exclusive boundary error

patterns.title: 15. Improper Integer Type Conversion
patterns.rootCause: Intermediate u128 result truncated to u64

patterns.title: 1. Improper Stake Accounting Updates
patterns.rootCause: The stake update function uses the wrong multiplier or doesn't account for compounding effects. For example, applying a global multiplier directly instead of relative to the user's last-seen multiplie

patterns.title: 2. Tank/Stability Pool Value Update Errors
searchKeywords: tank stability pool value update errors
patterns.rootCause: Updates tank total with deposited amount instead of net change

patterns.title: 3. Surplus Claim Logic Failure
patterns.rootCause: When total_deposit = 0, surplus cannot be distributed

patterns.title: 4. Incorrect Flow Rate Tracking
patterns.rootCause: Inbound flow tracked as outbound (or vice versa)

patterns.title: 5. Wrong Function Call in Integration
patterns.rootCause: Calls wrong flow tracking function

patterns.title: 6. Reward Accumulation During Inactive Periods
patterns.rootCause: Reward calculation doesn't exclude inactive periods

patterns.title: 8. Liquid Staking: Pending Coin Inclusion in Unstake
searchKeywords: liquid staking pending coin inclusion unstake
patterns.rootCause: Includes pending (not-yet-staked) SUI in total calculation

patterns.title: 9. Liquid Staking: Restake Routing Errors
patterns.rootCause: Restake moves SUI but doesn't update validator distribution record

patterns.title: 11. Order Book: Base/Quote Quantity Mismatch
searchKeywords: order book base quote quantity mismatch
patterns.rootCause: Uses fill quantity where order quantity is expected

patterns.title: 13. Share Price Manipulation via Donation
patterns.rootCause: Pool's Net Asset Value is directly manipulable

patterns.title: 14. Share Price Inflation via Rounding Drift
searchKeywords: share price inflation via rounding drift
patterns.rootCause: Every withdrawal leaves dust, inflating share price

patterns.title: 15. Exchange Rate Manipulation at Low TVL
1. UID Leak / Object Identity Bypass
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: The verifier does not validate structures without a `key` capability. During a package upgrade, a struct that originally lacked `key` can have this ability added. An object constructed with the old ve

patterns.title: 2. Dynamic Field Hash Collision
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: The `hash_type_and_key` function concatenates `parent`, `k_bytes`, and `k_tag_bytes` without inserting length delimiters. Due to the semi-arbitrary structure of `Struct` and `Vector` data types, two d

patterns.title: 3. Package Digest Collision
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: Sorting and concatenating without item boundaries

patterns.title: 4. Object Size Limit DoS
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: max_slice_size too large, leaf objects will exceed 256KB

patterns.title: 5. Kiosk Extension Fund Locking
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: Disabling extensions locks user funds

patterns.title: 6. Missing UID Validation in DeFi
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps

patterns.title: 7. Committee / Epoch Management Bugs
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: member_idx not reset between iterations

patterns.title: 8. Visibility / Ability Misuse via Upgrades
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: Public function allows arbitrary epoch manipulation

patterns.title: 9. Name Service Validation Failures
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps
patterns.rootCause: ttl not validated against MAX_TTL

patterns.title: 10. Dynamic Field Access Limit DoS
searchKeywords: compute digest for modules and deps

patterns.title: 1. Markdown/Control Character Injection in Transaction Rendering
searchKeywords: markdown control character injection transaction rendering
patterns.rootCause: The `renderSignTransaction` function interpolates raw transaction data into dialog text without escaping Markdown characters or filtering control characters. Attackers craft transactions with metadata

patterns.title: 2. Markdown Injection in Message Signing
patterns.rootCause: Raw message content shown in signing dialog

patterns.title: 3. Forced Transaction Signing via RPC
patterns.rootCause: dApp can call signTransaction immediately without prior context

patterns.title: 4. Public Key Extraction Without User Consent
searchKeywords: public key extraction without user consent

patterns.title: 5. User Confirmation Suppression
patterns.rootCause: Account info returned without any user interaction

patterns.title: 6. Key Derivation Path Manipulation
patterns.rootCause: Derivation path not constrained to Sui BIP44 coin type

patterns.title: 7. Development Origins in Production Builds
patterns.rootCause: Development origins included in production build
